description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a gable roof, set on a rectangular plot of land bordered by a low brick wall. The front facade features a covered porch with wooden railings and steps leading up to the main entrance, while the rear side includes a patio area with outdoor seating. The roof is dark gray with multiple chimneys and skylights, and the exterior walls are finished in a light color with wooden accents. Large windows are distributed along the front and back, providing ample natural light to the interior. The property includes a driveway and paved walkways, with a spacious lawn surrounding the building. The overall design is simple and functional, typical of suburban residential neighborhoods.
description: A single-story bungalow with a gable roof, covered porch, and large windows, set on a rectangular lawn with a driveway and patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, main entrance, driveway, and a large lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gable roof, wooden porch railings, and side entrance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area with outdoor seating and multiple windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a single window and the driveway extending to the back.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and rear windows
